Class GoogleFormsReader

java.lang.Object
org.jscience.core.io.AbstractResourceReader<Survey>
org.jscience.social.sociology.loaders.GoogleFormsReader
All Implemented Interfaces:
ResourceIO<Survey>, ResourceReader<Survey>
public class GoogleFormsReader extends AbstractResourceReader<Survey>
Reads, parses, and manages surveys from Google Forms.

This modernized reader implements AbstractResourceReader to provide caching and standardized access to Google Forms resources. It supports importing survey definitions and results from Google Forms.

Real implementation requires the 'com.google.apis:google-api-services-forms' library.

* @version 2.0
Since:
1.0
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)

    • getSupportedVersions

      public String[] getSupportedVersions()
      Description copied from interface: ResourceIO
      Returns the supported versions of the format this reader/writer handles.

      Each implementation MUST override this method to declare which versions of the underlying format are supported. The returned array should contain version strings in the format's standard notation (e.g., "3.0", "2.1", "Level 3 Version 2").

      Examples:

      • MathML: {"3.0", "2.0"}
      • SBML: {"Level 3 Version 2", "Level 3 Version 1", "Level 2 Version 5"}
      • PhyloXML: {"1.10", "1.00"}

      Returns:
      array of supported version strings, never null (empty array if version-agnostic)
